pattern_label: キャラクターのみ（Coco不参加）
pattern_description: しらたま・しずく・ひよりの3キャラクター、Coco不参加の全24種
desc_ja: 梅雨のじめじめも、気持ちの揺れも、ぜんぶそのままで大丈夫。しらたま・しずく・ひよりが三者三様の言葉で、あなたの毎日の会話にそっと温度を添えます。挨拶・共感・ひとこと返しまで、どの場面にも馴染むキャラクターのみ全24種。
desc_en: Rainy days, mixed feelings — it's all okay just as you are. Shirotsuma, Shizuku, and Hiyori each bring their own voice to warm your daily messages. 24 stamps for greetings, empathy, and every quiet moment in between.

stamps.scene: 梅雨の朝、雨音の中で小さく挨拶する
stamps.send_psychology: 雨の月曜の朝、でも明るく挨拶したい・相手の朝を少し温めたい
stamps.color_scheme: ソフトピーチ・アーリーモーニングゴールド・ミストグレー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Soft peachy morning gold palette with delicate misty grey suggesting a rainy dawn. A single tiny yellow rain boot sits as an accent at the lower corner.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body front view, both front paws raised in a cheerful morning wave greeting, sleepy-happy sparkling warm eyes, one ear slightly tilted, relaxed morning body pose — the kind that says 'good morning, but I'm still half asleep.' Small droplets of morning dew on its whiskers.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おはよ〜』naturally placed at top center, warm peachy gold lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 雨音を聞きながら、どうしても眠い梅雨の朝
stamps.send_psychology: 眠気を正直に共有したい・共感してもらいたい・相手も眠そうなときにそっと送る
stamps.color_scheme: ムーンライトラベンダー・シルバーミスト・ソフトインディゴ
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, dreamy and sleepy feeling. Soft lavender and silver mist palette evoking a cloudy rainy morning. Tiny ZZZ bubbles float softly in the background.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body view, eyes half-closed in a droopy barely-awake expression, front paws flopped forward loosely, tail curled low, head tilting slightly to one side — maximum sleepy cat energy. Sparkling but drowsy warm eyes.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ねむ〜い』naturally placed at top center, soft lavender lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: ゴールが近いのに最後の踏ん張りが辛い梅雨の午後
stamps.send_psychology: もう少しで終わるという状況を伝えたい・相手を励ましたい
stamps.color_scheme: コーラルピーチ・ウォームアンバー・クリームホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and encouraging feeling. Coral peach and warm amber palette suggesting late afternoon warmth peeking through rain clouds. A small glowing lantern at the edge suggests the finish line.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body view, leaning forward with one paw outstretched reaching slightly toward the viewer, tail raised in hopeful anticipation, bright sparkling warm eyes showing determination mixed with a touch of tiredness.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『あと少し〜』naturally placed at top center, warm coral lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 梅雨の雨が続いて少し憂鬱な気持ち
stamps.send_psychology: 梅雨の憂鬱を誰かと共有したい・「わかる〜」という共感を求めている
stamps.color_scheme: スチールブルー・レインシルバー・ソフトホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, slightly melancholy but cute feeling. Steel blue and rain silver palette with soft white, evoking an overcast rainy day. Gentle rain lines in the watercolor background suggest falling rain.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body view, sitting with both front paws pressed together looking up at the sky with a petite frown and drooping whiskers — adorably grumpy cat expression, not angry just pouty. Sparkling warm eyes despite the grumpy look.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『雨、やだなぁ』naturally placed at top center, soft steel blue lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 雨の日、お家でぬくぬくしたい気持ち
stamps.send_psychology: 癒しを求めている気持ちを伝えたい・かわいさで相手を和ませたい
stamps.color_scheme: ミルクキャラメル・ウォームピンク・バニラクリーム
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, irresistibly cozy and fluffy feeling. Warm milk caramel and soft pink palette evoking soft blankets and indoor warmth on a rainy day. A tiny cozy pillow or fluffy cloud as background accent.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), shown from a slightly above angle, all fur puffed up maximally, face buried into its own fluffy chest fur with eyes squeezed shut in pure contentment — maximum floof expression. When you look closely, you can see sparkling warm eyes peeking out.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『もふもふしたい』naturally placed at top center, warm caramel lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 梅雨の中を頑張り抜いた1日の終わり
stamps.send_psychology: 自分の頑張りを認めてもらいたい・相手の頑張りを称えたい
stamps.color_scheme: サンセットゴールド・ウォームオレンジ・シャンパンホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, triumphant and warm feeling. Sunset gold and warm orange palette suggesting the glow of accomplishment. Small gold star sparkles scatter around the character.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body view, standing tall on its back legs with both front paws raised high in a victory pose, tail raised triumphantly, face beaming with a wide proud smile and sparkling bright eyes shining with achievement.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『がんばったよ！』naturally placed at top center, warm golden lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 梅雨の雨音の中、もう休みたい夜
stamps.send_psychology: もう限界、寝るよという気持ちをかわいく伝えたい・許可を取りたいときのユーモア
stamps.color_scheme: ムーングレー・ソフトネイビー・スターダストシルバー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, sleepy nighttime feeling. Moon grey and soft navy palette with starlight accents evoking a quiet rainy night. A tiny crescent moon glows softly in the upper corner.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body view, lying down completely flat on its belly with paws stretched forward, head resting on the ground and face turned toward the viewer with one eye half-open in a sleepy pleading expression — pure 'please let me sleep' cat energy. Tiny sparkle in the one visible eye.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『寝てていい？』naturally placed at top center, soft moonlight silver lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 連絡を受けて確実に受け止めた
stamps.send_psychology: 了承を丁寧に伝えたい・かわいく「わかった」を届けたい
stamps.color_scheme: クリアネイビー・クリスプホワイト・ゴールドボタン
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, reliable and clean feeling. Clear navy and crisp white palette with gold button accents evoking a trustworthy professional tone, softened by the watercolor warmth.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with a neat compass-rose pattern in soft gold, sitting upright with one flipper raised in a crisp acknowledgment gesture and a composed confident expression, sparkling warm eyes showing quiet competence.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『了解です』naturally placed at top center, clean navy lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 梅雨の朝、大切な人に傘を確認する
stamps.send_psychology: 相手を心配してそっと確認したい・お節介ではなく思いやりのひとこと
stamps.color_scheme: レインブルー・セージグリーン・ウェットシルバー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, caring and rainy-day feeling. Rain blue and sage green palette with wet silver highlights evoking a fresh rainy morning. A small lavender hydrangea blossom decorates the corner.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with soft blue morning glory blooms, holding a tiny folded umbrella in one flipper and presenting it toward the viewer with a warm knowing smile — the expression of someone who came prepared and cares about you.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『傘、忘れてない？』naturally placed at top center, rain blue lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 報告に対して「大丈夫です」とやわらかく返す
stamps.send_psychology: 問題がないことを穏やかに伝えたい・かわいさで相手を安心させたい
stamps.color_scheme: フォレストグリーン・アイボリー・マーブルホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, calm and reassuring feeling. Forest green and soft ivory palette evoking steady composure. A tiny checkmark made of vines curls gently in the background.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with tiny four-leaf clovers painted in watercolor, sitting in a composed center-balanced pose with both flippers neatly placed, eyes closed in a serene satisfied expression with the slightest confident smile — utterly untroubled.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『問題ありません』naturally placed at top center, forest green lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 少し時間をもらいたいとき、かわいく伝える
stamps.send_psychology: 待ってもらうお願いをやわらかく伝えたい・堅くなりすぎずに礼儀を守りたい
stamps.color_scheme: ウォームテラコッタ・アイボリー・コッパーゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, patient and warm feeling. Warm terracotta and ivory palette with copper gold accents evoking a cozy waiting moment. A tiny hourglass shape suggests gentle passing of time.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with a watercolor terracotta pottery pattern, one flipper raised gently in a 'one moment please' gesture, expression warm and apologetic-polite, sparkling eyes showing genuine care for the other person's time.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『少々お待ちを』naturally placed at top center, warm terracotta lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: じっくり考えて計画を練っている最中
stamps.send_psychology: 考え中であることを伝えたい・「ちゃんと取り組んでいる」を示したい
stamps.color_scheme: スレートブルー・ペーパーホワイト・グラファイトグレー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, thoughtful and focused feeling. Slate blue and paper white palette with graphite accents evoking a focused thinking space. A tiny open book with blank pages sits nearby.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with a delicate slate blue line-pattern suggesting a map, peering intently at a tiny scroll with a tiny magnifying glass in one flipper, brow slightly furrowed in concentrated thought, sparkling eyes deeply engaged.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『計画中...』naturally placed at top center, slate graphite lettering with soft ellipsis, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 内容をきちんと確認できたことを報告する
stamps.send_psychology: 確認完了を丁寧かつかわいく伝えたい・相手を安心させたい
stamps.color_scheme: スカイブルー・クリアホワイト・ミントアクセント
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, clear and reliable feeling. Sky blue and clean white palette with mint accents evoking clarity and trust. A tiny soft checkmark tick glows in the background.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with small watercolor star shapes, sitting with a small clipboard-like tablet in one flipper showing a completed checkmark, expression calm and satisfied with sparkling warm eyes showing quiet pride in thoroughness.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『確認しました』naturally placed at top center, clear sky blue lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 不安な相手に根拠のない自信を持って伝える
stamps.send_psychology: 相手を安心させたい・不安な気持ちをほぐしたい・直感的なポジティブを届けたい
stamps.color_scheme: サニーイエロー・ブライトホワイト・ウォームゴールド

[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, bright and reassuring feeling. Sunny yellow and bright white palette with warm gold accents evoking immediate confidence and cheer.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird), full body front view, wings spread wide open in an embracing welcoming gesture, beak open in a bright reassuring call, standing tall with absolute confidence, sparkling warm eyes radiating genuine certainty and warmth.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『大丈夫！』naturally placed at top center, warm sunny yellow lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 誰かの挑戦を根拠満々に後押しする
stamps.send_psychology: 強いエールを送りたい・「なんか自信ある」という直感を伝えたい
stamps.color_scheme: コーラルオレンジ・シャインゴールド・クリアホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, bold and hopeful feeling. Coral orange and shining gold palette evoking the energy of a sunrise breaking through rain clouds. Small golden light rays radiate softly.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird), full body view, leaning forward with one wing extended forward pointing toward the viewer in a direct encouraging gesture, eyes blazing with absolute certainty and warm sparkling confidence, beak slightly open as if mid-cheer.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『絶対うまくいく』naturally placed at top center, vibrant coral-gold lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 梅雨の曇り空の先に、直感でいいことを察知する

stamps.color_scheme: ミントグリーン・ソフトゴールド・ミスティホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, quietly hopeful feeling. Mint green and soft gold palette with misty white evoking clearing skies after rain. Tiny soft rainbow droplets shimmer in the background.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird), side profile view, perched on one foot with the other foot slightly raised, head tilted upward knowingly as if sensing something good approaching, one eye half-closed in a soft knowing expression with sparkling warm glow.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『いいことあるよ』naturally placed at top center, soft mint-gold lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: ふとアイデアが浮かんだ瞬間
stamps.send_psychology: アイデアが浮かんだことを伝えたい・テンションが上がった瞬間を共有したい
stamps.color_scheme: エレクトリックティール・ブライトホワイト・スパークゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, electric and exciting feeling. Electric teal and bright white palette with sparkling gold accents evoking a sudden flash of inspiration. A tiny light bulb outline drawn in loose watercolor strokes glows nearby.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird), full body view, caught in a sudden upright snap pose — startled upright, wings slightly spread, beak open in an excited exclamation, one foot slightly off the ground in the energy of the moment, eyes wide and blazing with the spark of a new idea.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『閃いた！』naturally placed at top center, electric teal lettering with gold sparkle, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 雨の日をポジティブに捉えなおす
stamps.send_psychology: 梅雨の憂鬱を逆転させたい・相手の気分を上げる発見を共有したい
stamps.color_scheme: ハイドレンジアパープル・レインシルバー・ペタルホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, quietly charmed feeling. Hydrangea purple and rain silver palette with petal white evoking the unexpected beauty of the rainy season. Soft purple and blue hydrangea blossoms frame the lower corner.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird), perched on a branch with large purple hydrangea blooms surrounding it, rain drops landing gently on nearby petals, bird looking at a large raindrop on a leaf with an expression of genuine discovery and delight, sparkling warm eyes.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『梅雨も好きかも』naturally placed at top center, soft hydrangea purple lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 梅雨の中、二人でいれば平気だと伝える
stamps.send_psychology: そばにいる安心感を伝えたい・相手に「一人じゃない」を届けたい
stamps.color_scheme: エメラルドグリーン・ウォームアイボリー・ジェードホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and solid feeling. Emerald green and warm ivory palette with jade accents evoking steady companionship. A shared small umbrella in soft jade covers both characters.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) and Shizuku (small wise turtle) standing side by side snugly under one small shared umbrella, shoulders touching, both looking toward the viewer with matching calm confident expressions and sparkling warm eyes — the energy of absolute mutual trust.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『一緒ならへいき』naturally placed at top center, emerald green lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 急いで追いかける、少し待ってほしい
stamps.send_psychology: すぐ後ろにいることを伝えたい・可愛く「待って」を伝えたい
stamps.color_scheme: ソフトプラム・クリームピンク・ミストグレー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, slightly rushed but cute feeling. Soft plum and cream pink palette with mist grey evoking a rainy afternoon hurry. Motion blur dots trail behind the characters.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) running slightly ahead with tail flying behind, while Shizuku (small wise turtle) stretches one flipper forward and slightly open-mouthed in an urgent yet adorable 'wait for me!' expression, both with sparkling warm eyes.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ちょっと待って〜』naturally placed at top center, soft plum lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: ゴールが近いことを二人で確認し合う
stamps.send_psychology: 終わりが近い状況で励まし合いたい・もう少しだということを伝えたい
stamps.color_scheme: ウォームアンバー・ピーチゴールド・サンリットクリーム
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and encouraging feeling. Warm amber and peach gold palette with sunlit cream evoking late afternoon light breaking through rain clouds. A tiny glowing dot at the end of a short path suggests the finish.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) and Shizuku (small wise turtle) side by side, both looking in the same direction ahead, cat pointing one paw forward while turtle nods with a small knowing smile, both with calm determined sparkling warm eyes.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『もうちょっとだよ』naturally placed at top center, warm amber lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 梅雨の雨の中でも元気にしていることを伝える
stamps.send_psychology: 梅雨でも元気なことを示したい・相手に「自分も元気だよ」と伝えたい
stamps.color_scheme: レインボーパステル・フレッシュホワイト・ビビッドレイン
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, energetic and joyful feeling. Rainbow pastel palette with fresh white evoking a burst of energy despite the rain. A soft rainbow arch and rain drops mix in a celebratory way.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) and Hiyori (gentle white bird) both jumping mid-air joyfully in the rain — cat front paws raised high and tail curled, bird wings spread wide, both faces turned upward with rain drops splashing around them, expressions absolutely delighted, sparkling bright warm eyes.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『雨でも元気！』naturally placed at top center, vibrant rainbow-pastel lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.scene: 焦っている誰かに、ゆっくりしていいよと伝える
stamps.send_psychology: 相手の焦りをほぐしたい・ペースを落としていいという許可を渡したい
stamps.color_scheme: セレーンセージ・ペールゴールド・ミスティモーニング
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, serene and unhurried feeling. Serene sage and pale gold palette with misty morning tones evoking tranquil rainy-day stillness. Soft moss and fern shapes in the background.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle) and Hiyori (gentle white bird) seated together in perfect stillness, turtle's shell decorated with small painted fern leaves, bird with a tiny sage-tipped wing, both with calm gentle expressions and warm sparkling eyes radiating peaceful ease — no urgency whatsoever.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『急がなくていいよ』naturally placed at top center, serene sage lettering, 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.

stamps.dialogue: みんなでいれば大丈夫
stamps.scene: 梅雨の季節も、三人そろえば乗り越えられる
stamps.send_psychology: グループのみんなに一体感を届けたい・チームで頑張ろうという気持ちを表したい
stamps.color_scheme: チェリーブロッサムピンク・スカイブルー・ウォームゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, celebratory and warm feeling. Cherry blossom pink, sky blue, and warm gold palette evoking a joyful coming-together. Soft hydrangea blooms and tiny rainbow arcs in the background.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), Shizuku (small wise turtle), and Hiyori (gentle white bird) all gathered together in a close triangle formation — cat in center with both paws around the others, turtle leaning in warmly, bird perched atop between them — all three with wide warm sparkling eyes and expressions of absolute togetherness.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『みんなでいれば大丈夫』naturally placed at top center, warm tricolor lettering (pink, blue, gold), 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top.
stamps.content: みんなでいれば大丈夫

threads_promo.content:
しらたまの「おはよ〜」は、月曜の朝の憂鬱をそっと溶かしてくれる。
#きょうも、そのままで⑦ 📲プロフィールリンクよりどうぞ

言葉に詰まったとき、動物たちが代わりに言ってくれる仕組みがある。
#きょうも、そのままで⑦ 📲プロフィールリンクよりどうぞ

梅雨の会話に、ほんのちょっと温度を足してみて。
#きょうも、そのままで⑦ 📲プロフィールリンクよりどうぞ

今日の疲れ、しらたまに言わせたら気持ちが少し楽になった。
#きょうも、そのままで⑦ 📲プロフィールリンクよりどうぞ

しずくの「傘、忘れてない？」が、梅雨の朝の必需品になってる。
#きょうも、そのままで⑦ 📲プロフィールリンクよりどうぞ

「了解です」を堅くならずに送れるスタンプ、ずっと探してた。
#きょうも、そのままで⑦ 📲プロフィールリンクよりどうぞ

送ると相手がくすっとする。それだけで十分だと思う。
#きょうも、そのままで⑦ 📲プロフィールリンクよりどうぞ
